title: Consolida stenocarpa
intro: Consolida stenocarpa, also known as Larkspur, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help in relieving muscle cramps and spasms. The bioactive constituents of Larkspur include alkaloids, specifically delphinine and ajacine, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Larkspur is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat muscle and nerve disorders, as well as to reduce anxiety and insomnia.
